ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, without sugar, powder, instant

ingredients_text: Coconut (27%), Almonds (21%), Sunflower Seeds (17%), Pumpkin Seeds (9%), Organic Coconut Blossom Nectar (8%), Cashews (6%), Chicory Root Fibre (4%), Cocoa Powder (2.5%), Hazelnuts (2%), Linseeds (1.5%), Chia Seeds (1%), Cacoa Nibs (1%)
